svg.text: Production-ready GCP infrastructure · One terraform apply · ~12 minutes · Zero ClickOps
scoped to exact repo · attribute_condition enforced
auto-rollback on failure · Trivy scan · no manual steps
Cloud SQL private IP · servicenetworking.googleapis.com · no public endpoint possible
HTTPS → Cloud Run · managed TLS · global anycast · no load balancer needed
16 APIs enabled at project level before any module runs
github_secrets_summary → paste directly into GitHub Secrets
bootstrap.sh creates WIF + state bucket before first apply
env vars from Secret Manager at runtime
private IP only · no public endpoint
connects via PSA subnet · no firewall exceptions
lifecycle: ignore_changes prevents rotate on re-apply
Cloud SQL reachable only from within VPC
